task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N070 business-rule-extraction artifact. The ground truth is at: 业务规则清单.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.业务规则清单.csv:
rule_id,domain,title,rule_semantic,hardness,object_or_scope,applicable_subject,condition_text,condition_expr,action,failure_result,exception_or_escalation,depends_on,negative_examples,lifecycle,decision_refs,blocker_refs,open_question_refs,certainty,evidence
RULE-cinemaai-001,access-control,Only verified production studios may create new anime projects,compliance,constraint,project,studio,"Studio account must have 'verified_production_partner' status and pass KYC check within last 90 days.",{"AND":[{"eq":["studio.status","VERIFIED"]},{"lt":["studio.kyc_last_verified","now-90d"]}]},create_project,REJECT_PROJECT_CREATION,auto-reject + notify compliance team,["KYC_VALIDITY_THRESHOLD"],["Studio A has 'PENDING' status → rejected","Studio B passed KYC 120 days ago → rejected","Studio C is unregistered → no access to UI flow"],active,[],[],["Is 'VERIFIED' status sufficient for all content categories?"],"明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§3.2.1.L12-L15"
RULE-cinemaai-002,workflow,An anime project enters 'PREPRODUCTION' only after script draft, storyboard, and voice cast are all approved,temporal,constraint,project,production-manager,"All three assets — script_draft.approval_state = 'APPROVED', storyboard.approval_state = 'APPROVED', voice_cast.approval_state = 'APPROVED' — must be simultaneously true before state transition.",{"AND":[{"eq":["script_draft.approval_state","APPROVED"]},{"eq":["storyboard.approval_state","APPROVED"]},{"eq":["voice_cast.approval_state","APPROVED"]}]},transition_to_preproduction,BLOCK_TRANSITION,escalate to lead producer if pending >72h,["ASSET_APPROVAL_SCHEMA"],["Script approved but storyboard pending → no transition","All assets approved except voice cast (status='REVISION_REQUESTED') → blocked","One asset approved 5 mins ago, others approved 3 days ago → allowed"],active,[],[],[],"明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§4.1.3.L8-L12"
RULE-cinemaai-003,concurrency,Each scene generation job must be uniquely keyed by (project_id, scene_number, version),idempotency,constraint,scene-generation-job,ai-engine,"No duplicate job submission allowed for identical (project_id, scene_number, version) tuple across any cluster node.",{"eq":["job.key","concat(project_id, '_', scene_number, '_', version)"]},enqueue_job,DUPLICATE_JOB_IGNORED,log + emit metric + return 204,["JOB_KEYING_SCHEMA"],["Same project_id+scene_number+version submitted twice in <1s → second ignored","Same project_id+scene_number but version='v2' vs 'v2.1' → accepted as distinct","Different project_id but same scene_number+version → accepted"],active,[],[],[],"明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§5.4.2.L22-L26"
RULE-cinemaai-004,rating,Anime projects tagged 'MATURE' must include at least two human reviewers with 'CONTENT_MODERATOR' role,compliance,constraint,project,content-moderator,"If project.tags contains 'MATURE', then length(filter(reviews, lambda r: r.role == 'CONTENT_MODERATOR')) >= 2.",{"AND":[{"in":["project.tags","MATURE"]},{"gte":[{"length":[{"filter":["reviews",{"lambda":["r",{"eq":["r.role","CONTENT_MODERATOR"]}]}]}]},2]}]},submit_review,REJECT_REVIEW_SUBMISSION,auto-flag + require reassignment,["MODERATOR_ROLE_DEFINITION","MATURE_TAG_POLICY"],["Project tagged MATURE with only one moderator review → rejected","Project tagged 'TEEN' with two moderators → accepted","Project tagged MATURE with zero reviews → cannot submit"],active,[],[],[],"明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§6.3.5.L33-L37"
RULE-cinemaai-005,rate_limit,Free-tier users may generate no more than 30 seconds of AI video per day,rate_limit,rule,video-generation,user,"Sum of duration_seconds of all video_generation jobs initiated by user_id in last 24h <= 30.",{"lte":[{"sum":[{"filter":["jobs",{"and":[{"eq":["jobs.user_id","user_id"]},{"gt":["jobs.created_at","now-24h"]}]}]},"jobs.duration_seconds"]},30]},start_generation,THROTTLE_AND_QUEUE,notify user + offer upgrade prompt,["FREE_TIER_SECOND_LIMIT"],["User generated 25s at 09:00, then tries 10s at 10:00 → throttled","User generated 30s at 00:01, then 5s at 23:59 → allowed (new window)","User on Pro tier → no limit applied"],active,[],[],[],"基于上下文推断","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§7.2.4.L18-L21"
RULE-cinemaai-006,compensation,If auto-scene-generation fails due to invalid character pose JSON, system must revert scene state to 'DRAFT' and preserve all prior annotations,compensation,constraint,scene,ai-engine,"On scene_generation_failure.reason == 'INVALID_POSE_JSON', scene.state must be set to 'DRAFT' and scene.annotations must remain unchanged.",{"eq":["scene_generation_failure.reason","INVALID_POSE_JSON"]},revert_scene_state,REVERT_TO_DRAFT,emit alert + trigger annotation-integrity audit,["POSE_SCHEMA_VERSION","SCENE_STATE_MACHINE"],["Failure reason='TIMEOUT' → no revert","Failure reason='INVALID_POSE_JSON' but annotations were overwritten → violation","Failure reason='INVALID_POSE_JSON' and scene.state was 'REVIEW_READY' → reverted to DRAFT"],active,[],[],[],"明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§5.5.1.L41-L45"
RULE-cinemaai-007,business,Scene export format defaults to MP4-H.264 unless user explicitly selects AV1 or ProRes,preference,preference,export-config,user,"If user.export_format_preference is unset or null, default to 'MP4_H264'. Otherwise use the selected value.",{"coalesce":["user.export_format_preference","MP4_H264"]},apply_export_format,USE_DEFAULT_FORMAT,none,[],["User never set preference → MP4_H264 used","User set preference to 'AV1' → AV1 used","User set preference to '' (empty string) → MP4_H264 used"],active,[],[],[],"明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§8.1.2.L7-L10"
RULE-cinemaai-008,temporal,Preview renders expire 4 hours after generation and become non-downloadable,temporal,rule,preview-render,user,"preview_render.created_at < now - 4h implies preview_render.download_url returns 410 GONE.",{"lt":["preview_render.created_at","now-4h"]},serve_download,RETURN_410_GONE,auto-purge from CDN cache,["PREVIEW_TTL_SECONDS"],["Preview created at 10:00 → downloadable until 14:00","Preview created at 10:00 → 14:01 request returns 410","Preview created at 10:00 → 13:59 request returns 200"],active,[],[],[],"明确写明","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§9.3.7.L28-L31"
RULE-cinemaai-009,compliance,All exported video files must embed a visible watermark containing studio name and timestamp,compliance,constraint,video-export,export-service,"Every exported video file (MP4/AV1/ProRes) must contain an overlay watermark showing studio.name and ISO8601 timestamp of export_time.","未明确",embed_watermark,EXPORT_BLOCKED,block + log + escalate to legal,["WATERMARK_TEMPLATE_SPEC","EXPORT_AUDIT_REQUIRED"],["Export without watermark text → blocked","Watermark shows wrong studio name → blocked","Watermark timestamp is UTC but export_time was JST → mismatch → blocked"],active,[],[],[],"待确认","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§10.2.1.L5-L8"
RULE-cinemaai-010,governance,Any rule referencing 'MATURE' tag must also reference 'COMPLIANCE_OVERRIDE' config flag for emergency deactivation,compliance,constraint,rule-system,platform-admin,"All rules where condition_text contains 'MATURE' must declare 'COMPLIANCE_OVERRIDE' in depends_on array.","未明确",enforce_dependency,VALIDATION_FAIL,block rule deployment until fixed,[],["RULE-cinemaai-004 declares MATURE but omits COMPLIANCE_OVERRIDE → invalid","RULE-cinemaai-009 does not mention MATURE → no dependency required","New rule RULE-cinemaai-011 adds MATURE logic and includes COMPLIANCE_OVERRIDE → valid"],active,[],[],[],"基于上下文推断","[CinemaAI-PRD-v0.4]§Appendix-B.L1-L4"
